atomic_units.action: Record the candidate's deferral request in the system
Consult with the Hiring Manager to assess operational feasibility of the deferral
Obtain HR Manager approval for the deferral request
atomic_units.condition: If the requested deferral period is greater than 30 days

atomic_units.action: Determine whether the deferral request is approved
atomic_units.condition: Based on feasibility assessment and any required HR Manager approval

atomic_units.action: Update the joining date in the HR system to the new agreed date
Notify IT Support to reschedule the IT setup for the new joining date
Confirm the new joining date with the candidate
Inform the candidate that the original joining date must be maintained
atomic_units.condition: If the deferral is not approved
atomic_units.output: Candidate notified of original joining date

atomic_units.action: Treat the situation as an offer decline and follow the offer‑decline process
atomic_units.condition: If the candidate is unable to comply with the original joining date
